name: indexbind
description: Embedded retrieval artifacts for Node, browsers, and Workers.

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:wasm
scripts.build:bundle: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli.js build-bundle
scripts.docs:build:cloudflare: npm run docs:index && npx --no-install mdorigin build cloudflare --root docs/site
scripts.docs:deploy: npm run docs:build:cloudflare && npm run docs:init:cloudflare && wrangler deploy
scripts.inspect:artifact: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli.js inspect
scripts.benchmark:basic: npm run build:cli && tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && node dist/cli.js build fixtures/benchmark/basic/docs "$tmpdir/basic.sqlite" hashing && node dist/cli.js benchmark "$tmpdir/basic.sqlite" fixtures/benchmark/basic/queries.json
scripts.testcase:cloudflare-worker:prepare: npm run build:cli && mkdir -p fixtures/manual/cloudflare-worker-issue-18/public/search && node dist/cli.js build-bundle fixtures/benchmark/basic/docs fixtures/manual/cloudflare-worker-issue-18/public/search/index.bundle hashing
scripts.testcase:cloudflare-worker:dev: npm run build && npm run testcase:cloudflare-worker:prepare && wrangler dev --config fixtures/manual/cloudflare-worker-issue-18/wrangler.jsonc
